ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT(ISNEW()), ISCHANGED(Status), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Completed / Verified"),
OR(
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "EOI Document Review"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Booking Creation"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang") )
),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Booking Verification"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Receipt Verification"), $User.Alias <> "nahme" ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Submitted to Sales Admin Manager"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Generate RF"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "RF Signed"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Downpayment Verification"), $User.Alias <> "nahme" ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Approved by CSO"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "nsing", $User.Alias = "Snaz") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "SPA Preparation"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Send SPA for Signature"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "SPA Signed"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "SPA Review"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Oqood Submission"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "EOI Verification"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ),
AND( CONTAINS(Subject, "Oqood Approved"), NOT( OR($User.Alias = "iahme", $User.Alias = "pbang", $User.Alias = "relma") ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorised to update this task for the selected subject
